name: Breaking the Bad Ending! - Ashe, Rei, And Goblins (Chapter 3)
description:
Help Ashe and Rei exterminate the Goblins!!!

WARNING!!!

Contains mentions and themes related to violence, Gore, mind break, and other sexual themes such as grape (you know the meaning of this)

Here's the sauce (clIck)

Ashe, Lihan, and Rei:

Yo, Ezra here!

I mainly made this bot because I don't see as many bots about this chapter, and the ones I've seen on this site either are not as detailed or have too specific scenarios.

In this one, you can be quite literally anything you want. You can be a random adventurer, someone from Lihan's party, a spirit they summoned to help, some other unknown all-powerful being, a temporary party member (please don't commit a Calypso), anything! Hell, you can even go as Papyrus or Sans from Undertale in this if you have the right prompt.

Before you ask, yes, I tested the bot a lot, and it took me DAYS to make it this long. I tested it with different scenarios and personas, and despite the scenario being made with the intention for you to be a woman, you can also go in as a man, or like how I did, a redhead guy who looks like Diluc who has giant mechanical arms and is too angry to die.

So yeah, do anything you want here.

Save Ashe and Rei with Lihan while you are a literal tortoise? Doable.

Some cosmic entity who decided t
creator: EzraTgeFallen2
